{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322042542A088E1C74AB356C52A90"}"},"total":4171},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7449224803402449689","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了，我感觉很好看，在我看来最好的是始终有人陪着。不同其他小说女主用完就丢，或找过由头再提起。这本小说女主没有长篇大论单独描写，而是始终与男主一起，写到男主就有女主。有人一直陪伴关心的感觉是很不错的。在我看来陪伴是最长情的告白，其他小说救一两次，相处几天就写什么至死不渝，死去活来的，感觉把我当傻子一样。这本书没有多少惊心动魄的情节，一切都是水到渠成，他们感情早就不止爱情了。龙姬也很可爱，感觉笔墨不太多，但对师尊很尊敬依恋。不知为何就是很喜欢龙姬。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734413197,"group_id":"7255489481241791522","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyTb/hganPgZ8cmyuDSmSghhe3JMDsDqgTioMGy15HIg","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1922404613625431","user_name":"爱吃绿豆芽炒粉的项坤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1922404613625431","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1662444885,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255489481241791522","book_info":{"abstract":"一缕魂灵意外穿越至洪荒，自那日后出世就挨雷劈的冤大头造化青莲身体内苏醒，但自己却没能夺舍青莲，反倒令得原本的青莲诞生了灵智，化作了并蒂双莲。
自己竟是成了替身。
作为没脸自称穿越者的无系统、无外挂人士，争霸洪荒、拳打鸿钧、脚踩三清是不敢想，青玄就想蹭点功德，混张良民证保身，避免被判定为洪荒黑户身陨大道神雷之下。
“道友与贫道有缘。”却不想才小心翼翼溜出不周山，却遇到了一位开挂大佬。
看着这位在众多小说故事之中多扮演终极老六、顶级反派boss的大佬，青玄人麻了。
却不想这大佬人怪好的，十分凭亿近人，莫不是传说有误？
真真假假，虚虚实实，身在其中，如何辨得？
（偏传统洪荒，无系统，有女主，另外，不太擅长直接的爽文写作，望多担待，逻辑在线，可能节奏稍慢，简介无力，求个支持，感谢！轻喷。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4f961d485aa8b143440779d8056df90a","author":"春衫倚斜桥","author_id":"","book_id":"7255489481241791522","book_name":"洪荒：道侣悟性无双，无敌之姿","book_short_name":"洪荒：并蒂莲","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#485058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7269964714963763752","read_count":"42531","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1007206"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"419","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,洪荒,架空,开局,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0490d7188d972673e0978094b679720f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308742&x-signature=ndwqFgsPmEV6nhSC%2FdS%2BYgJhxLo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"967183825900077","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"480"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322042542A088E1C74AB356C52A90"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读23小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":82724,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":19444},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7492760690358027032","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"再来补个追评，先前一评四分，二评我补个五分，到了后边，前边我说的问题基本没了，各方面也越来越好了，不来个五分，我对不起这第二遍完整阅读，也对不起我对于这本书的时长。
有个小的建议是，作者最好还是别许多章节结束后自己说哪里不好不好，一来这样显得觉得好的读者很呆，二来有些读者就是天生和你抬杠的，“罪己诏”下的太多只会助长风气，恶评可以看或许有不错建议的，好评多看看对于别人承认劳动成果心情总归是开心的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744547313,"group_id":"7255489481241791522","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1843200984886590"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255489481241791522","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1158"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读105小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":376357,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7492267241556591384","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"属于少有的“纪录片+解读”类，个人挺喜欢，但是前期作者语癖比较严重，“却是……”用的太频繁，而主角性格通过一件件事的表现让人感觉起伏大，有“虚伪造作”之感，然后可能没想好大纲，主角一开始强调与人族因果云云，但是后边又不能在人族危机时出手，属于立了人设却无法实践难免被人诟病。还有就是一些地方作者写的时候给出了解释，但是后边剧情逻辑却无法自洽，这种情况不少。
但瑕不掩瑜，个人觉得是一部值得加书架的佳作，对于一些其他洪荒只有过程的大势，本书给出了出于洪荒背景的解读，且逻辑通顺，这本书甚至能作为一部知道类的背景资料供其他写作洪荒文的提供一些新的思路。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744431663,"group_id":"7255489481241791522","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"楚思雨的霸道帅夫君正是在下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwnp7bgsoCHn5tMTh4qa+vtoavdhFYyL8wbONoB1Gxrm","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/12c434c22adf46e69a68aee7eb4e6eed~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701570&x-signature=hxLKWg0SpwCAb0CzETgZ3c49d4w%3D","user_id":"1843200984886590","user_name":"木止木我抱走了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1843200984886590","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255489481241791522","book_info":{"abstract":"一缕魂灵意外穿越至洪荒，自那日后出世就挨雷劈的冤大头造化青莲身体内苏醒，但自己却没能夺舍青莲，反倒令得原本的青莲诞生了灵智，化作了并蒂双莲。
